name: bring-your-own-app
description: Mode D scaffold (realistic): targets the BYO Angular+Express demo brought up by docker-compose.app.yml. Used by `mj test regression init bring-your-own-app` to seed a project; see the README in this directory for the full adoption walkthrough.
notes: This app ships with intentional bugs to demonstrate the suite catching real defects (see README). Replace the Dockerfile + Angular source with your own app, edit byo-metadata/tests/ to match its UI flows, and re-run.
